description_long: This is a modern wall-mounted radiator with a series of gently curved, horizontal tubular bars arranged in parallel, forming a ladder-like structure. The bars are finished in a light wood or brass tone, giving the radiator a warm, contemporary appearance. The vertical supports on either side are straight and connect all the horizontal bars, with visible mounting brackets attaching the unit to a flat, light-colored wall panel. At the bottom left, there is a metallic valve assembly, likely for water or heating fluid regulation, and a secondary connection point on the bottom right. The overall design is sleek and minimal, with no decorative grilles or covers, emphasizing functionality and style. The radiator's open, evenly spaced bars suggest it could also serve as a towel warmer in addition to its primary heating function.
description: A sleek, wall-mounted radiator with curved horizontal bars in a light metallic finish and visible valve connections at the bottom. Its minimalist, ladder-like design is both functional and stylish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full array of curved horizontal bars, vertical supports, and both bottom valve connections clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the radiator's slim profile and the outward curve of the horizontal bars.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain mounting panel with no visible radiator features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the slim profile and the mounting brackets attaching the radiator to the wall.
attribute_pipe_connections: two, bottom left and bottom right, horizontal orientation
attribute_fin_arrangement: horizontal curved bars in parallel ladder formation
